headline: Assessing Charles Schwab’s (SCHW) Valuation After Launch Of The Schwab Teen Investor Account
summary: Charles Schwab (SCHW) is expanding its reach with the new Schwab Teen Investor account, which offers 13 to 17 year olds and their guardians access to investing tools, education, and monitored trading. See our latest analysis for Charles Schwab. The Schwab Teen Investor launch and the recent Forge Global acquisition come as investor sentiment cools slightly, with a 90 day share price return decline of 7.68%, a 1 year total shareholder return of 26.78%, and a 3 year total shareholder return...
